evals.prompt: 主动道具使用后进入选择模式，直到离开当前房间才取消；如果玩家换房、死亡、或者道具丢失都不能残留 UI。写实现提示词。
evals.expected_output: Defines UI/runtime state owner, player keying, create/update/reset callbacks, room/death/item-loss cleanup, and explicitly avoids saved data unless needed.

evals.prompt: 我想把受到的伤害延迟到本层结束再结算，存档退出再进来也不能丢。
evals.expected_output: Routes to saved data, defines serializable fields, player keying, floor transition settlement, reload reconstruction, and avoids storing live damage/entity userdata.

evals.prompt: 挑战里每个房间第一次杀敌会生成奖励，但出了挑战不能影响普通流程。
evals.expected_output: Defines challenge-only gate, room state reset, normal-run cleanup, and checks that state cannot leak outside the challenge.
